programme.desc: An inmate with incredible artistic abilities is charged in tragic crime; another inmate's seeming obsession with jail food causes problems; an unconventional marriage ends violently.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Pendleton Juvenile is the last stop in Indiana for young offenders who have committed serious crimes; the staff there must always be prepared for the unexpected, and is determined to rehabilitate impulsive teens who are often angry and violent.

programme.title: Lockup: Pendleton: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A maximum-security prison is responsible for educating and rehabilitating teenage gang members, sex offenders and juveniles with mental health issues; inside the razor wire fences, anything can happen, and some days are more chaotic than others.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: With over 2,000 inmates, the Wabash Valley Correctional Facility has a larger population and more acreage than the small town in which it's located; after a decade in confinement, one of Indiana's most infamous inmates moves to general population.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The killer of a corrections officer fights to be freed from 16 years of solitary confinement, and boyhood friends struggle to parent their kids from behind prison walls; but one, cut-off from visits with his son, is on a razor's edge.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At Wichita's Sedgwick County Jail an inmate launches an attack on another, sending him to the emergency room; a detective must get to the bottom of it, while a pastor hopes to get to the heart of it.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Wichita, Kansas and surrounding Sedgwick County take pride in their Wild West roots, but Billy the Kid's gang would be seriously outgunned by the notorious gangs of modern day Wichita.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: In Wichita, Kansas, a young woman says she stabbed a man in self-defense; a skinhead with a violent past leaves his girlfriend battered and bruised.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A convicted thief continues his stealing ways inside the jail; a former law enforcement officer turned meth addict serves time with and grows closer to her dealer; a man gets arrested for allegedly threatening the sheriff.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate with incredible artistic abilities is charged in tragic crime; another inmate's seeming obsession with jail food causes problems; an unconventional marriage ends violently.

programme.title: Death Note: Dealings
programme.desc: Ryuk, the Shinigami, or god of death, who dropped the Death Note into the human world, warns Light that someone is on his trail.

programme.title: Death Note: Pursuit
programme.desc: Light, now known to the world as Kira, tests the Death Note to understand the scope of its powers by killing off six convicts in various ways.

programme.title: Death Note: Tactics
programme.desc: Soichiro Yagami demands to meet with L in person when he finds out that L has secretly brought FBI agents into Japan.

programme.title: Death Note: Unraveling
programme.desc: Light meets a woman at the Police Department with an urgent message for the Kira task force.

programme.title: Death Note: Overcast
programme.desc: Light uses the Death Note to try to get rid of the woman who could get him captured, and is shocked when it doesn't work.

programme.title: Death Note: Glare
programme.desc: L insists on setting up bugs and cameras in the homes of Chief Yagami and Deputy Director Kitamura.

programme.title: Death Note: Encounter
programme.desc: The murders continue, and L grows suspicious of Light's too perfect behavior and decides to investigate him on his own.

programme.title: Death Note: Doubt
programme.desc: L's suspicion of Light deepens, compelling him to invite Light into the investigation.

programme.title: Death Note: Assault
programme.desc: As predicted on the tapes sent to Sakura TV, news anchors and commentators who expressed doubt about Kira die one by one.

programme.title: Death Note: Love
programme.desc: With a second Kira now on the loose, L asks Light to join the task force and pose as the real Kira in order to catch the copycat.

programme.title: Death Note: Confession
programme.desc: Light goes to Aoyama to discover the identity of the second Kira before L becomes more suspicious.

programme.title: Death Note: Friend
programme.desc: Light and Misa show each other their Death Notes, and Light asks Misa to have her shinigami Rem get rid of L.

programme.title: Death Note: Wager
programme.desc: Evidence turns up that points to Misa Amane as the second Kira.

programme.title: Death Note: Decision
programme.desc: Misa is in confinement, though her memories of the Death Note have been completely wiped away.

programme.title: Death Note: Execution
programme.desc: After fifty days of confinement the killings continue, and Misa and Light are released.

programme.title: Death Note: Ally
programme.desc: Though L is still suspicious, Light and Misa, their memories of being Kira wiped clean, return to headquarters….

programme.title: Death Note: Matsuda
programme.desc: Matsuda, the task force member assigned to watch Misa, is eager to distinguish himself.

programme.title: Death Note: Makeshift
programme.desc: L's team discovers that the Yotsuba Group meet in secret to discuss the elimination of individuals who are troublesome to their company….

programme.title: Death Note: Performance
programme.desc: The Yotsuba Group hires Eraldo Coil to uncover L's identity.

programme.title: Death Note: Guidance
programme.desc: Misa succeeds in narrowing down the Kira suspects in the Yotsuba Group to one: Higuchi.

programme.title: Death Note: Frenzy
programme.desc: Higuchi of the Yotsuba Group attempts to kill Matsuda of the task force, and is surprised when he doesn't die after 40 seconds.

programme.title: Death Note: Revival
programme.desc: Higuchi is captured and tells the investigators about the Death Note.

programme.title: Death Note: Silence
programme.desc: Light, his memory recovered, orders Misa to begin killing after Higuchi dies.

programme.title: Death Note: Renewal
programme.desc: Light has removed everyone in his way and is closer to achieving his perfect world.

programme.title: Death Note: Abduction
programme.desc: A new investigator steps forward, Near, a central figure in the SPK, an organization that is trying to catch Kira without relying on L.

programme.title: Death Note: Impatience
programme.desc: Light, acting as L, reveals to Near that his sister Sayu has been kidnapped by someone wanting to trade her for the Death Note.

programme.title: Death Note: Father
programme.desc: Light tries to discover where Mello and his Mafia associates are hiding and uses Misa's eyes to find the Death Note's current owner.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the beginning of a new road trip with Thomas Plant and Anita Manning. The experts are touring the country in a yellow Lotus and their first leg sees them start in Hertfordshire and work their way towards an auction in Banbury.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On day two of their trip, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning travel around the southwest of England. Thomas learns about one of the UK's great inventing families, and Anita finds out how a mistake on a map resulted in the naming of America.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Thomas Plant and Anita Manning are embarking on the third leg of their road trip. Thomas is leading the charge after his success in the last auction, but can Anita catch him up?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in South Somerset, Thomas Plant and Anita Manning head towards auction in Wimborne, Dorset. Anita learns about a prehistoric man at Cheddar Gorge and Thomas hears about one man's pioneering fight to forecast the weather.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Thomas Plant and Anita Manning begin the final day of their road trip in the seaside town of Brighton. Anita has taken the lead with just one auction to go. Does Thomas have what it takes to claw his was back to victory?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Old friends become rivals as antique experts Phil Serrell and James Braxton hit the road in a 1955 Austin Healey. The men start their journey in Glasgow and Phil heads off the mainland before the pair meet up again for auction in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their road trip, Phil Serrell has some catching up to do. Can he claw back the deficit? Or will James Braxton pull further away as the pair cross the border from Scotland towards an auction in Kendal?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and James Braxton travel through northwest England on the third leg of their trip. Phil visits the birthplace of the world's most iconic band in Liverpool and James relives his childhood as he finds out the story of scouting.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in Kingsley, Cheshire, Phil Serrell and James Braxton head to auction in Liverpool on the penultimate leg of their road trip, Phil with a commanding lead. Can James find a way back into the competition before the trip is over?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antique experts Phil Serrell and James Braxton begin the final leg of their road trip in Wales. With James closing the gap, it's all to play for as the experts head for a final auction showdown in Newport, Shropshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The tenth season of Antiques Road Trip begins with Philip Serrell taking on Christina Trevanion. Leg one commences in Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway and heads towards the first auction in Newcastle Upon Tyne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two sees auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell begin the next leg of their journey. Starting in Keswick in the heart of the North Lakes in Cumbria, they weave their way towards an auction in Crooklands, in the South Lakes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Halfway through their trip, Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell are neck and neck, having each won an auction. They begin day three in the seaside town of Southport, shop their way around Lancashire and land in Lincoln for the auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Auctioneers Christina Trevanion and Philip Serrell embark on their penultimate leg. Christina had great success at the last auction. Can Philip catch her up as they kick off in Manchester and head to the auction in Melbourne, near York?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.desc: The experts inspect a ring containing a lock of Byron's hair and some postcards from 1916.

programme.desc: Items include a communion book once owned by Wilfred Owen and a vintage Aston Martin.

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team travel to the Lake District.

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the Roadshow team roll out their 40th-anniversary tour as they scour the country in search of hidden treasures. The magnificent Castle Howard in Yorkshire is their first stop as visitors bring in family heirlooms.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: On one of the wettest days in Roadshow history, over 2,000 visitors queue to see Fiona Bruce and the experts sheltering under the canopy at Minehead station, which is run by West Somerset Railway.

programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to the magnificent setting of Nymans garden near Crawley for a busy day. Objects exciting the experts include an axe which was reputedly used by Mallory for his 1922 Everest expedition.

programme.title: Wild New World

programme.title: Wild New World
programme.desc: The collapse of an ice dam in the new world, at the end of the Ice Age, triggers a gigantic rush of water.

programme.title: Wild New World

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Untouched since the dawn of time, evolution runs riot in New Zealand to create some of the rarest and most unusual wildlife on Earth.

programme.title: Wild New Zealand

programme.title: Wild New Zealand
programme.desc: Four penguin species begin breeding every winter in four very different and rugged locations on New Zealand's South Island.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: The animals and people of Northern China.

programme.desc: Towering mountains provide refuge for tropical species.

programme.desc: Human activity impacts the ecosystem of China's eastern seaboard.

programme.desc: The miracle of yeast helps Raymond to create a French classic: brioche; he gets down to basics with a French country bread recipe that's essential for any baker to add to their repertoire; lastly, he makes a spectacular apple croustade.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc combines the universally popular ingredients of egg and cheese to make a classic omelette with a secret technique; he then uses a Comte from his home region in France to make a family-style souffle.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc focuses on tomatoes, opening with a simple salad recipe inspired by his mother; he also makes a creamy risotto, stuffed tomatoes glazed with cheese and a series of ices and sorbets to cleanse the palate with elegance.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella introduces her love of Italian food through a spectacular yet simple Sicilian pasta with tomatoes, garlic and almonds, and a mid-week family feast of tagliata.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un caso de NCIS pasa de muerte accidental a asesinato cuando la evidencia revela que un teniente de la Armada murió por sobrehidratación forzada. Mientras tanto, Gibbs conoce a la nueva pareja sentimental de Ducky.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca respuestas cuando el actual esposo de la exesposa de Gibbs y Fornell es secuestrado de manera sospechosa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Compañeros
programme.desc: Mientras Danny y Maria escoltan drogas confiscadas, su convoy es atacado y Baez resulta herida. Danny busca al cartel responsable. Frank debe navegar lo personal y lo político.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Puentes ardientes
programme.desc: Danny y Baez tienen nuevos compañeros temporales. Jamie y Eddie planean robar la placa de un detective. Frank habla sobre igualdad y compromete su relación con la Arquidiócesis.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Perdonar y olvidar
programme.desc: Jamie defiende a un oficial acosado por testificar contra su pareja. Erin descubre que su amante podría ser su jefe en la fiscalía. Danny pide a Erin que acuse de asesinato a un hombre que disparó a una niña de 15 años que murió 8 años después.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Fuerza excesiva
programme.desc: Frank debe decidir si defiende a su hijo Danny, acusado de usar fuerza excesiva, o la reputación de la policía. Jamie se conecta con una doctora después de llevar a un indigente al hospital.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC ayuda a la hija periodista de Rossi, Joy (Amber Stevens West), a investigar la desaparición de una alumna de la universidad.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está persiguiendo a un sospechoso en Phoenix que está secuestrando víctimas con insomnio. Además, Hotch y García se enfrentan a la amenaza del grupo de sicarios clandestinos, llamados“La docena sucia.”

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de dos agentes encubiertos de la DEA y la desaparición de un tercero, el UAC se suma a la NSA para investigar si una red clandestina de drogas por Internet está involucrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un oficial de la guardia costera en un barco abandonado y encuentra a una familia libanesa buscando asilo en EE. UU. Mientras tanto, Tony y McGee buscan la pareja perfecta para Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un caso de NCIS pasa de muerte accidental a asesinato cuando la evidencia revela que un teniente de la Armada murió por sobrehidratación forzada. Mientras tanto, Gibbs conoce a la nueva pareja sentimental de Ducky.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/02/2013. Bourdain and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, move from hip, modern Lima back in time into pre-Columbian Peru.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Congo, the setting of one of his favorite books, Conrad’s “Heart of Darkness.”

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/22/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Andalucia during Semana Santa, Holy Week, to visit longtime director Zach Zamboni, who currently lives in Granada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/29/2013. With a combination of cultures, New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/06/2013. Home to chef Rene Redzepi of Noma, Copenhagen is known as the cultural center of Denmark. Anthony Bourdain explores its fantastic food and natural beauty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/13/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Sicily, where he goes fishing for his supper and sets out to find a home-cooked meal.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/19/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty, by examining the country through personal stories, food and music.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect with an ATF warrant runs from a traffic stop and gets tased. Drones help locate stolen motorcycles in Fort Wayne. A suspect leaves behind soggy footprints when he bails from a stolen car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Deputy learns a new game from Spring Break coeds. Deputies respond to a shooting at the beach. A teenager is caught with alcohol. A woman tells Deputies she's being followed on the boardwalk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated teen is found passed out in the surf late at night. Deputies find trespassers in a hot tub. A floating wallet is returned. The Marine Unit rescues a family thrown from jet skis.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An underaged spring breaker is caught with a 'blackout rage gallon' and issued a ticket. A zero-tolerance policy of no alcohol or glass containers on the beach is enforced in Pinellas County.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers encounter dancing tourists on the Vegas Strip. An uncooperative spring breaker finds herself in cuffs. Surfers and lifeguards rescue swimmers from a riptide. A beachgoer lies about his age.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teen holding a beer walks up to a Deputy. A jet skier violates a no wake zone. Deputies cut a tangled bird free. A minor discards his can of alcohol and tells Deputies his mom will pay his citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife resists as a hotel clerk cheers on Officers. A man protests the legality of a stop but finally admits why he argued with Officers. A passenger becomes emotional when meth is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A domestic call turns chaotic when a male suspect resists and his girlfriend interferes with his arrest. A truck with detachable red and blue lights is located during a call of a police impersonator.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers use a police SUV and a taser to stop a fleeing man with a knife. A hit-and-run suspect crashes into a gas station. An unlicensed driver has warrants in Greene County, Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect leads Officers on a car chase before running from a K9. A PIT maneuver is used to end a stolen vehicle pursuit. A man claims he has crazy eyes when a Deputy suspects him of driving high.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man flees from Deputies with the hood up on a pickup truck. A suspect bails from a stolen truck and pretends he wasn't driving. A drunk driver is caught after a hit-and-run at a dance hall.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist gives up after leading Fontana Officers on a wild pursuit. A K9 is used to track a felony shoplifting suspect who fled a traffic stop. A Stop Stick is used to end a chase in Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen TV hangs out of a van during a slow-speed pursuit. A woman bites her boyfriend during an argument in Florida. A man claims he received a stolen car from a relative.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female driving a stolen car spins out and runs from Officers in Missouri. A burglary in progress leads Officers to a suspect breaking windows at a church. An altered tag is discovered to be stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gives Officers a fake name when he's stopped on a bike with no lights. Officers initiate a high-risk traffic stop on a reckless driver. A man is caught walking in traffic on the Vegas Strip.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lengthy pursuit in Independence, MO goes off-road. Deputies chase a motorcyclist who claims he ran because he doesn't have a motorcycle endorsement. A man ingests fentanyl during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman rams a police car and begs Officers to take care of her dog. A man tells Officers he was just a passenger in a stolen Honda. A woman crashes her bicycle while trying to elude Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is tased twice after a car chase. His passenger resists and is also tased. A driver refuses to exit his truck in Florida. A woman claims the pills in her purse belong to her sister.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a bike refuses to stop and tries to hide a drug-filled backpack. A motorcyclist's attempt to flee is foiled by a big rig blocking the road. Meth is found in a center console during a stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female shoplifter flees in a stolen box truck and crashes into a retaining wall. A green Honda runs in Wichita. A female passenger in Florida admits to hiding drugs and a pipe in her intimate area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect makes a video call during a pursuit to apologize for relapsing. A burglar runs in circles in a vain attempt to elude Officers. A Sergeant finds a magnetic box full of meth and a hidden gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a car with a loud exhaust admits he panicked and ran. A woman caught riding a stolen moped claims she borrowed it. A man is caught with a tool for deactivating security tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver speeds off when asked to step out of his truck. Deputies learn a man with a warrant for fentanyl is hiding in a backyard. A suspect steals a portable speaker after threatening an employee.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect with an ATF warrant runs from a traffic stop and gets tased. Drones help locate stolen motorcycles in Fort Wayne. A suspect leaves behind soggy footprints when he bails from a stolen car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Deputy learns a new game from Spring Break coeds. Deputies respond to a shooting at the beach. A teenager is caught with alcohol. A woman tells Deputies she's being followed on the boardwalk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An intoxicated teen is found passed out in the surf late at night. Deputies find trespassers in a hot tub. A floating wallet is returned. The Marine Unit rescues a family thrown from jet skis.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An underaged spring breaker is caught with a 'blackout rage gallon' and issued a ticket. A zero-tolerance policy of no alcohol or glass containers on the beach is enforced in Pinellas County.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five people are killed in a small plane crash a mile off the Vegas strip, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a prominent news anchor during a live broadcast.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When CSI Mac Taylor decides to surprise his girlfriend in Vegas, he discovers she's missing and asks his friend D.B. Russell for help. Gary Sinise of CSI:NY guest stars.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a famous Cuban singer's sister who's in town as part of a U.S. tour.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara is a lead suspect in an investigation after a brief encounter with another man in which she was the last person to see him alive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When several prominent poker players lose their lives, the CSI team is called to investigate before more victims surface.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs join David Phillips at his high school reunion when he discovers the prom queen's been murdered.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs find a body near a forest reserve, they discover what might be a serial killer and his bizarre lair.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a triple homicide, Russell has to find a way to connect with a 6-year-old girl who was the sole survivor and witness.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a popular spiritual retreat when a body is found floating in a mud bath.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a ghost hunter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: As Russell and his team investigate a series of murders, one of their own confronts peril on a dangerous undercover mission to get close to the killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: D.B. Russell leads the CSI team on a hunt to find Morgan and Ellie Brass following their kidnapping by a ritualistic killer, in the 14th season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI vinculó un cuerpo con quemaduras graves a una posible ejecución por una silla eléctrica y a un legendario asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: U+000AUna noche llena de celebración termina con una explosión cuando el director de una fundación de becas para sordos es asesinado por un mortal coche bomba, lo que llevó a Sara a interrogar a los estudiantes y profesores de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una donación de segunda mano se vuelve espantosa cuando se encuentra un cadáver en una caja. Mientras tanto, la esposa de Langston hace una visita sorpresa al laboratorio criminalístico.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifica contra el famoso asesino de 'Dick y Jane', Nate Haskell. Mientras tanto, Nick recibe una llamada de un adolescente con problemas, Jason McCann, para advertirle del peligro inminente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo CSI está en alerta zombi cuando dos hombres inicialmente declarados muertos misteriosamente vuelven a la vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ex policía convicto, el equipo de CSI se topa con una lista en su celda de la prisión con los nombres de varias personas que creía que podrían haber sido el verdadero asesino de su esposa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una serie de muertes instigan una apuesta entre el equipo de CSI en cuanto a si han "golpeado para el ciclo," un homicidio, un suicidio, un accidente y una muerte natural en una sola noche.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston y Sara se dirigen a Lady Heather en busca de ayuda para localizar al culpable responsable de herir a una mujer antes de que aparentemente fuera mutilada hasta la muerte por un león de montaña.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de su fuga, Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane", reaparece cuando envía por correo electrónico un inquietante video de amenaza de muerte al padre de una de sus novias.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston se vuelve más decidido que nunca a localizar a Nate Haskell, el famoso asesino de "Dick & Jane," después de descubrir que ha secuestrado a su ex esposa, Gloria.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de años de persecución y un sinnúmero de asesinatos, Langston se encuentra cara a cara con el asesino en serie, Nate Haskell, dentro de la casa donde comenzó su juerga de asesinatos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Múltiples tiroteos y apuñalamientos en un tranvía público dejan al equipo de CSI con un testigo y muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Tres sospechosos se presentan con tres razones diferentes por las que mataron a toda una familia y el equipo de CSI tiene que determinar quién dice la verdad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante una cita,Stokes se da cuenta de que una obra de arte en una exhibición tiene partes del cuerpo en descomposición,lo que lleva a una investigación en toda regla.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ryan Wolfe is attacked and seriously injured while investigating the murder of a distraught soon-to-be ex-wife, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must rely on a video game for their next clue as to where a group of young gunmen will strike next.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team is hard-pressed to find the killer of an infamous drug lord, and a member of the team is investigated for drugs by Internal Affairs.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A rapist is brutally murdered after his identity is exposed. Horatio and the CSI team are called in to investigate the murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team investigate a group of male “pickup artists” out to score when one of them unexpectedly turns up dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s Latin Festival shifts from Samba to somber when a crowded dance floor becomes the scene of a gang member. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A bizarre murder of a South Beach club owner turns out to be a script where art is imitating life. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s longtime criminal nemesis Walter Resden surfaces once again, and Caine is determined to finally bring him to justice.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a white supremacist is acquitted for the murder of his wife after learning she is racially mixed, it’s up to Horatio to bring the killer down.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A band of masked gunmen invade an upscale spa, with the female customers' luxury cars as their booty. A customer is injured in the melee.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The bodies of two men, shot execution-style, are discovered in an abandoned hotel slated for demolition. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A cell phone call leads the team to investigate a kidnapping that, unless they reach the victim before it’s too late, could soon become a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un pescador escapa por poco de la muerte, el equipo de CSI tiene que esquivar las balas para mantenerlo con vida y descubrir quién lo persigue.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer embarazada es agredida, Horatio y el equipo luchan por ella y la vida de su bebé mientras rastrean a su atacante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la investigación de un millonario muerto lleva al equipo de CSI a un servicio de citas de elite, Ryan se hace pasar por un empresario para exponer las mentiras del casamentero.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el agua de una boca de incendios se lleva toda la evidencia de la escena del crimen, el equipo de CSI debe recrear un doble asesinato muy extraño.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en un partido de roller derby, lo único más corto que las faldas de las chicas es su paciencia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami arde en crímenes y caos cuando Memmo Fiero, el asesino de la esposa de Horatio Caine, regresa para tomar el control de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI tratan de descubrir cuál de los nerdos se vengó cuando un bravucón de la escuela secundaria murió apedreado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer escapa por poco de la muerte a manos de un asesino en serie, Horatio hará cualquier cosa para rastrear al psicópata.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren un club de caza exclusivo donde la presa es humana, el juego más peligroso de todos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un chofer de camión de reparto y un ama de casa de su ruta son asesinados, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI intentan encontrar una conexión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un presidiario fugitivo toma a Natalia como rehén y le cuenta un secreto impactante sobre sus crímenes. Horatio Caine y el resto del equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine ha decidido proteger a un luchador de artes marciales mixtas de su peligroso hermano que recientemente se escapó de la cárcel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra a una universitaria muerta en un jacuzzi, investiga un caso marcado por celos, psicosis y compañeros de cuarto de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio Caine persigue a un misterioso sospechoso de asesinato, descubre que toda la vida del hombre es una elaborada farsa.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young woman, dressed as a mermaid, is discovered floating in a bed of kelp. The CSIs search Manhattan for her murderer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A marine is found dead in Central Park. Across town, the team investigates the death of a woman found in a burned out car.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a security guard is stabbed to death, Mac and Flack rush to the scene. While investigating the murder, a bomb is detonated.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two bungee jumpers witness a death on the Brooklyn Bridge, Mac and his new love interest Peyton Driscoll are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Holly Golightly look-alikes rob a jewelry store the detectives find themselves questioning the girls’ involvement in the world of blood diamonds.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay investigate the death of a vodka spokeswoman dressed as an ice queen, and murdered with her scepter at a promotional event.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial murderer leaves his victims in coded t-shirts. The team struggles to decode his mythological clues and put their main suspect behind bars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay explore the worlds of goth and glam when a young girl that belongs to the underground “suicide girls” cult is found dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young hotel employee falls to her death from a hotel rooftop after she becomes embroiled in a deal with a scheming top model.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is summoned from a night at the opera to a bloody crime scene. Across town, a famous bachelor is found dead in his swim gym.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a paintball player is found shot to death, Flack realizes that a dirty cop under his supervision could be to blame.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a night of heavy partying two underage girls make the reckless decision to drive home. In route, the girls get into an accident.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Flack investigate the death of a parachute professional whose chute was pelted with dead pigeons causing him to plummet to the ground.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Hawkes is framed for shooting a bartender and then later sent to prison, the team takes to the street to set their investigator free.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El intocable (S7 Ep16)

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Edward Honaker fue declarado culpable de violación, sodomía y agresión sexual agraviada y condenado a tres cadenas perpetuas en prisión. El sostuvo su inocencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de Seattle no tenía sospechosos en el violento asesinato de la cantante post-grunge, Mia Zapata.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una joven fue encontrada muerta, la policía arrestó rápidamente al sospechoso más probable. Pero la tecnología de punta de la NASA permitió a un odontólogo forense demostrar que el hombre equivocado estaba tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Este episodio documenta un atentado mortal en una iglesia en Oakwood, Illinois, en diciembre de 1997.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, de 19 años, fue condenada por apuñalar a su madre, Barbara Mullenix, en el 2006. Supuestamente cargó el cuerpo sangriento de su madre en una caja de cartón antes de tirarla en Newport Bay, en California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un vecino vio cómo un hombre apuñalaba a su esposa, la empujaba a la piscina y le metía la cabeza bajo el agua.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un auto en una zanja de drenaje con dos cuerpos adentro, una punta de un dedo de un guante de látex encontrada en la escena del crimen apuntaría a los investigadores hacia el asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo poco profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el estreno de la serie Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia, una asistente de vuelo de Connecticut desaparece. La policía sospecha que su esposo es culpable de asesinato, pero ¿pueden comprobarlo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven es apuñalada más de 100 veces. El asesino deja atrás el ADN, pero los investigadores deben jugar al gato y al ratón para obtener el ADN de un sospechoso que coincida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asistente del gerente de una carnicería de Florida es apuñalado hasta la muerte. Parece ser un robo que salió mal, pero una huella sangrienta revela que él conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cazador de Colorado que había recibido tres disparos fue víctima de un crimen bien planeado. Los investigadores sospecharon dos armas y dos asesinos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Poco después del amanecer, se inicia un incendio en un contenedor de basura en Vancouver. Nadie ve al pirómano ni el fuego, que arde durante horas en el estacionamiento desolado. Pero hay más que basura en este contenedor en llamas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los médicos quedan desconcertados cuando un niño de dos años es trasladado urgentemente al hospital con convulsiones cerebrales y dificultades para respirar.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli finally announces the squad. Injuries threaten the opening of Cowboys training camp. Game Day chaos endangers a flawless performance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented hopefuls arrive to try out for the best cheerleading team in the world, while many of the returning girls are looking for redemption. New judges increase the pressure of moving on to Finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Veterans fight for their jobs as new girls try to live their dreams and make DCC Training Camp. Standing in their way is; panel Interviews, solos, an exhausting dance combination and a room full of very tough judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The new candidates' eyes are opened as they get a taste of what it is to be a DCC. As girls struggle to learn the dances, the reality of being "Big Time", sets in. Melissa Rycroft meets the new girls for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit. Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship. Extra stress is added on Makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up. The girls better start looking good because uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show are on the agenda. Surprises continue when two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves, stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko. Kitty Carter rocks a few of the candidate's worlds. Cameos give Kelli & Judy a fresh perspective on the girls. At Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig has a problem – the recording deal he and his band won last year is about to expire, but “Downtown Sasquatch” is nowhere near ready to record. With Jimmy in the hospital, they’re missing a key member.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back with Ashley and he’s determined not to screw it up this time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Dinosaur

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: Finding evidence of alien technology in Smythe’s office, the Doctor, Jamie, and Zoe make their escape in Lady Jennifer’s ambulance, but Smythe gives orders to have them killed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that they are on an alien planet divided into different time zones where human soldiers fight never-ending wars.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The rebels seize control of the Aliens' HQ but the Doctor is forced to send a call for help to his own people, the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The green slime oozing from the drill head is transforming men into monsters. Stahlman refuses to listen to the warnings and resorts to sabotage so that his project may continue.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons

programme.title: Asia - Secret Lives, Hidden Places
programme.desc: On the top of a smoking volcano, on the southern island of Kyushu in Japan, a Shinto priest performs rights that keep his community safe. 200 years ago his town was completely destroyed. The last eruption here was in 1991.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Kristina continues her stay at the Hide Safari Camp with Sean. Cecil's pride is still in the area scouting for prey. Sean teaches Kristina about elephant anatomy and wild dogs take down an impala and mate right outside camp.

programme.title: Antarctica
programme.desc: For the first time in history the mysterious icy expanse of the highest, driest and coldest continent has been captured in the giant screen format. Experience the life and drama of Antarctica like never before.

programme.title: The Last Reef
programme.desc: The Last Reef is an uplifting, inspirational experience capturing one of nature's more vibrant and diverse wonderlands. These biodiversity hot spots are as vital to our lives as the rainforests.

programme.title: Life In The World's Largest Crater
programme.desc: Just over two billion years ago, a meteorite the size of Table Mountain slammed into Earth just outside the present day town of Vredefort. It created a scar that is today recognised as the oldest and largest meteorite impact site in the world.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Forests and jungles are home to most of the Earth's wildlife and biodiversity. Their conservation and protection are crucial to many species and the only guarantee for future generations to enjoy this precious treasure.

programme.title: Mantises - Masters of Deception
programme.desc: They are killers. They kill with unbelievable precision. They fight Kung Fu style and are seen in Japan as a symbol of vigilance - the mantises.

programme.title: The Living Sea
programme.desc: From the tropical waters of Palau in the South Pacific, to the barreling waves of Oahu's North Shore and Nova Scotia's major tidal swings, The Living Sea celebrates the beauty, power and importance of the ocean.

programme.title: Ten Deadliest Snakes With Nigel Marven
programme.desc: With an infra-red camera in the dead of night we watch a forest pit-viper sense and strike a target just fractionally warmer than its surroundings.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie and Irene conspire against Rondell; Titus takes matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie finds a way to keep her enemies at bay; the highly anticipated anniversary celebration at Thelma's Place ends sooner than expected.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: The Barnes have a big surprise for the Carlisles, forcing Stephanie and Evan to fight fire with fire; Amara receives backlash at work for her prior indiscretions.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie plays the ultimate trump card with Amara; Bella takes another chance on love, only to wake up to a nightmare; Rondell and Evan are blind-sided.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cassie catches up with an old friend; Cam and Reggie visit a school; Missy and Allison each receive some unsolicited advice.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Missy pressures Reggie to make a play for their independence; M-Chuck's satisfaction comes at the cost of Cassie's; Cam rebuffs Flaherty.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Newly signed basketball star Cam Calloway is embraced by the city of Atlanta, but an entourage consisting of family members proves to be a liability.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam's mother shares too much information while attending a charity event; Uncle Julius wants to be Cam's "talent scout."

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam gets an unexpected wish from a dying teenager; Reggie wants Cam to pay for the family's expenses.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Complications arise when Missy works to get Reggie into an exclusive country club; a church pastor does not approve of Cam's sister or her lifestyle.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam and Reggie reunite with a childhood friend whose basketball dreams were derailed by a stint in prison; Cassie looks for houses; Cam is offered a shoe endorsement deal.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam intervenes when a former girlfriend tries to reconnect with Reggie; Cam and Reggie must decide between multiple shoe endorsement deals.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: The Calloways upgrade to a spacious new mansion; team owner Jimmy Flaherty attaches serious strings to Cam's max deal.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost deals with threats from Kanan and Angela's investigation as bodies continue to drop within his organization.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: James prepares to leave Ghost behind; Angela must choose between honor and love; Shawn's death leaves Tasha reeling; Tommy is forced to make bold moves.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost ties up loose ends while dealing with new competition; Tommy confronts Tasha, who must learn to coexist with Angela; Tommy gains an adviser.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost is offered an opportunity to take the clubs to the next level; Tommy reunites with Tasha in a scheme, while he also attempts to keep a contact under control.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A visit from Steven's father evokes confrontation between the two.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As the new editor of his school paper, Alex uncovers a cheating scandal and to everyone's chagrin, prints a list of students who were caught including Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: To the dismay of the Keaton children and their equally conservative grandparents, Steven and Elyse take time out Thanksgiving Day to attend an anti-nuke rally-and end up spending the holiday in jail.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Though Alex loves working at Mr. Adler's "Mom and Pop" grocery store, to the old man's dismay, he quits to "climb the corporate ladder" at an ultramodern supermarket.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: The Keatons consider buying a gun for protection after getting burglarized.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When a blizzard forces the Keatons to spend Christmas at home, Elyse's gift to Steven an album filled with fascinating old photos sparks flashbacks to the births of their three children.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory resents Elyse for the advice she gives her pregnant friend.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: With the FBI hot on Ned's heels for embezzling 4.5 million dollars in corporate funds, Elyse's ethical brother and Alex's idol tells the family why and where he hid the money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: As Big Brother to a 10-year-old Vietnamese boy, Alex tries to mold Ming into his own image, and he learns an unforgettable lesson when he breaks a promise to the adoring child.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex gets stuck babysitting for his little sister Jennifer, who is fed up with feeling in the way at his poker game and decides to disappear.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: While gearing up to face the television cameras as captain of his high school's team on "Quiz-Em", Alex panics at first when a teammate drops out and then launches a tutoring program a la Eliza Doolittle for his sister Mallory.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Elyse gets so wrapped up in work that she neglects her family.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When pretty Carrie Newman and her mother Julia come to visit the Keatons, Carrie's forward behavior sends Alex into a panic.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven and Elyse realize how lucky they are when their friends come over for a visit, but are unaware that it will be for the last time.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Alex takes diet pills for a lift during midterms, his dependency level increases daily.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory secretly submits a picture of Elyse and herself to an ad agency for a mother-daughter-modeling contest.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven's assistant at the station is bright, talented, funny, and witty...and in love with him.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: When Mallory's boyfriend Jeff arrives home from college and wants to go steady, she's elated, but it's soon apparent that he's a little awed by the school and merely grasping at the familiar.
